title: Shanghai Madness
writer: Frederick Hazlitt Brennan, Edward T. Lowe Jr., Austin Parker
actors: Spencer Tracy, Fay Wray, Ralph Morgan
plot: In the 1920s Pat Jackson destroys a Chinese post and is discharged from the Navy. Li Po Chang hires him to run a gunboat up the river. He drops Wildeth off at a mission for safety, but when his boat returns the mission is being at...
